_comment: AOS Package Validator — Config Template v1.0. Fill in all fields marked REQUIRED.
package_root: REQUIRED — absolute path to package root, e.g. /path/to/S005-P004-v4
source_root_label: REQUIRED — label used in docs for the asset root, e.g. SOURCE_ROOT
source_root_rel: REQUIRED — relative path from package_root to assets dir, e.g. assets
output_rel: output — relative output dir under source_root (default: output)
instruction_file: REQUIRED — Instructions file relative to package_root
prompt_file: REQUIRED — Activation Prompt file relative to package_root
doc_files: OPTIONAL — additional doc files to scan, e.g. PACKAGE.md

work_packages.spec_file: REQUIRED — LOD400 spec, relative to source_root
work_packages.mandate_file: REQUIRED — Mandate file, relative to source_root
create_files: OPTIONAL — new files this WP creates

OPTIONAL — old_field_name.fallback_pattern: OPTIONAL — regex for allowed uses of old name

cowork_capabilities: OPTIONAL — capabilities that Instructions should declare, e.g. Shell, Python, Read, Write, Edit, TodoList
